name: Jet Fighters with Friends 5
short_description: Jet Fighters with Friends 5 - UFOs are attacking London, Go get 'em! Single Player OR Multiplayer Jet Fighter Game with A.I. UFO Bots. PvP or COOP.
detailed_description:
Jet Fighters with Friends 5

UFOs are attacking London, Go get 'em!

Single Player OR Multiplayer Jet Fighter Game with A.I. UFO Bots.

PvP or COOP.

Fly different types of Jets.

Use Guns and Missiles to defeat them to win !

Climb Your way to the top, shoot and hunt enemies in a multiplayer match.

You will be challenged to determine the best pilot who destroys the other jet fighters.

Take Your Jet to new heights, the sky is NO Limit !

** You need a Solid & Fast Internet Connection for best results. **

* This game is part of the "Jets" mini-series event from Archor Games, be sure to check it out on Steam! *
